description: Style Notefrench connection tees indulge in a minimalist uncomplicated aesthetic. Layer this under a tailored blazer and fitted chinos, or for a pared down look, we recommend a fitted pair of denims with no distressing or wash. Style this with low top shoes without socks for maximum effect. Product DetailsBlack T-shirt, has a V neckline, back yoke and branding on the left chestMaterial and care100% cottonMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cool ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
